subcodes.first_line: O thou leaf who art enraptured! For some time no tidings have been received from thee, and all the members of the Household continuously inquire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه مدتیست خبری از شما نرسیده جمیع حرم متصل استفسار میکنند که
subcodes.subjects: @priority over other activities in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
